value.description: A curated collection of open-source macOS applications built with Swift
extracted_paragraphs: ScreenSage Pro, record beautiful screen recordings in minutes on macOS
IP.IM, Free IP address information query website
HiPixel, An AI image super-resolution (upscaling and enhancement) tool designed specifically for macOS
Using my app is also a way to support me:

This list curates open-source macOS applications built with Swift, spanning a wide range of categories from productivity to utilities. For macOS developers, these projects showcase practical Swift implementations and offer high-quality code samples and best practices to help you master core macOS skills such as UI design, performance optimization, and menu bar integration.

Contributions are welcome via PR, and I will feature your app on my social media account (𝕏). Contents Audio Backup Browser Chat Local LLM AI Cryptocurrency Database Development Git JSON Parsing Other Development Web Development iOS / macOS Downloader Editors Markdown Text Extensions Finder Games Virtual Machines Graphics Screenshot / Screen Recording IDE Images Keyboard Mail Menubar Notch App Compression tool Color Picker Music News Notes Other Player Podcast Launchpad Productivity Screensaver Security Sharing Files Social Networking Streaming Cleanup & Uninstall System Clipboard Terminal Touch Bar Utilities VPN & Proxy Video Wallpaper Window Management

Audio AUHost - Host AudioUnits v3 plugins. AudioMator - Audio metadata editor for inspecting tags, batch editing, managing artwork, and tagging releases with MusicBrainz. Aural Player - Winamp-style audio player. CanYouHearMe - Lightweight tool for monitoring your own microphone input in real time. Fader - One-click audio output switching with Bluetooth connect and per-app volume control. Fmusic - macOS music player with multi-format playback and lyrics display. FluidVoice - Voice-to-text app with AI enhancement. FreeFlow - Push-to-talk speech-to-text tool that inserts polished transcripts into any app. HiFidelity - An offline audiophile music player built with the BASS audio library and TagLib. LyricsX - Display lyrics for iTunes/Spotify. Mesmer - Dictation and text-rewriting tool with a floating toolbar. MonitorControl - Adjust external monitor settings. NoiseBuddy - Quickly toggle AirPods modes. Petal - Fast, local-first audio transcription app with a clean, minimal interface. PairPods - Share audio across multiple Bluetooth devices with one click. Tutti - Streams the same audio to multiple output devices at once. Parakey - Push-to-talk dictation tool with fast on-device speech recognition and no cloud processing. parrot - A minimal push-to-talk dictation daemon with on-device transcription that inserts text at the cursor. PlayStatus - Menu bar controller for Spotify and iTunes. Plug - Hype Machine music player. R128x - EBUR128 loudness measurement toolkit for batch processing of audio files. Radiola - Lightweight internet radio player. Scope - Audio oscilloscope tool. Spotify4BigSur - Spotify widget for Notification Center. Lurar - Menu bar 10-band parametric EQ for headphone listening, capturing system audio via Core Audio Process Tap without any virtual loopback driver. SystemEQ - System-wide parametric equalizer with 10/31-band EQ, AutoEQ headphone presets, hearing calibration, and a real-time visualizer. Suohai - Audio device lock for macOS. Tuner - Instrument tuner. OwlWhisper - Fully offline voice input tool with hotkey-to-speak workflow and local transcription. Codex Voice - Hold Control-M to speak and insert the transcript into the focused app. Cursor Voice - Push-to-talk voice assistant that can see your screen, control apps, and respond in real time. SpeakType - Offline voice-to-text tool that lets you speak and paste text anywhere with a hotkey. Typester - Enables speech-to-text dictation using Soniox or Deepgram. TypeNo - Local voice input tool that transcribes speech and pastes the result into your current app. jmc - macOS media organizer. waveSDR - Software-defined radio app. VoiceInput - Real-time speech-to-text tool that types transcribed text into the focused app. VoiceInk - Real-time speech-to-text app. OpenQuack - Transcribes a 5-minute clip in 2.8 s — local WhisperKit dictation, noise-robust, lives in your menu bar. Backup Arco - An incremental backup tool designed with simplicity in mind. Syncalicious - Sync macOS preferences. TimeMachineTrimmer - Lightweight utility to trim old Time Machine backups and reclaim disk space. Browser Finicky - Always opens the right browser. Ora Browser - Less noise, more browsing. Plash - Make any website your desktop wallpaper. Privacy Redirect for Safari - Redirect to privacy-friendly alternatives. QuickBrowser - A lightweight link router that lets you pick a browser or auto-route URLs by pattern. Web - A tiny AI-powered browser built with SwiftUI, fast, private, and Apple Silicon only. Chat Beagle IM - Powerful XMPP client with support for file transfer, VoIP and end-to-end encryption. CopilotForXcode - Xcode extension for GitHub Copilot MessagesHistoryBrowser - Browse and search Messages.app history. HuggingChat - Native chat interface for open-source language models. LlamaChat - Chat with your favourite LLaMA models Mocolamma - A cross-platform app for managing Ollama servers and models. Onit - An AI chat sidebar that can dock to any app on your Mac! Seaglass - A truly native Matrix client for macOS. Swiftcord - A fully native Discord client for macOS built 100% in Swift! Telegram - Source code of Telegram for macOS on Swift. WardenApp - A Fully Native AI Chat App For macOS WhatsAppBar - Send WhatsApp message from menu bar. Local LLM apfel - CLI and OpenAI-compatible local server for Apple's on-device foundation model. LlamaBarn - A menu bar app to easily install, run, and access local LLMs on your Mac. ModelStatus - Monitor local AI model servers across Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp, MLX, and other OpenAI-compatible APIs. Osaurus - Local LLM server and AI infrastructure with menu bar, CLI, and shared tools. Sero - Private local AI workspace for chatting with documents, research files, developer knowledge, and structured data using local models. Sidekick - Chat with a local LLM on macOS using your files — no extra setup. AI AccountyCat - AI focus companion that detects attention drift from your active context and gives brief nudges to get you back on task. ADHD Focus Mate - AI focus companion that gently nudges you back on task when distracted. AI Memory Reader - Browser and editor for AI agent memory files, with beautiful rendering and support for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and more. Ayna - Multi-provider AI chat client with multi-model comparison, MCP support, and local model access. AppleAi - Access multiple AI assistants from your menu bar with one shortcut. Warden - Multi-provider AI chat client with local model support and built-in web search. Writing Tools - System-wide AI writing assistant for grammar and style improvements. AIUsage - Dashboard for tracking AI subscriptions, quotas, costs, and accounts. Poli - On-device AI writing assistant for proofreading, rewriting, summarizing, and translating in any app. KeyType - Open-source, local LLM-powered tab autocomplete that offers inline ghost-text suggestions in any focused text field. Prism - SwiftUI menu bar app for switching Claude Code API providers with one click. Quotio - AI subscription manager with quota tracking and automatic failover. ClaudeBar - Real-time monitoring of usage quotas for various AI coding assistants. Claude Usage Tracker - Track the usage of Claude Code. Claude Usage Monitor - Live Claude.ai usage monitor with a counter and color-coded status. Claude-Usage - A tiny floating widget that shows your Claude.ai usage at a glance without opening the browser. Claude God - Claude usage monitor with quota tracking, cost analytics, and burn rate predictions. Headroom - Live menu bar monitor for Claude usage with session and weekly quota progress plus reset countdowns. Claudoscope - Claude Code session browser with usage insights and security checks. ClawdHome - Tool for securely isolating and managing multiple OpenClaw gateway instances. CodexBar - Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login. DS4 Control - Control panel for local ds4 servers that launches and monitors DeepSeek V4 (Pro/Flash, 1M context) and switches coding CLIs like Pi, Claude Code, or BYOC. Shortcast - Turns long videos into ready-to-post TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts with automatic finding, cutting, captions, reframing, and scheduling. AgentPet - Tracks multiple coding agents in one glance by showing who is working, done, or waiting for your input, with a reactive desktop pet. Skills Manager - Discover, browse, install, and tag skills for AI coding assistants from GitHub repositories or local folders. MiniMaxBar - MiniMax usage monitor with quota tracking in the menu bar. QuotaBar - View and compare API usage across MiniMax, GLM, DeepSeek, and Kimi. MyUsage - Unified usage monitor for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity across devices. Remodex - Local-first remote control tool for using Codex from your iPhone. Usage4Claude - Real-time monitor for Claude AI usage limits and quota windows. UsageBar - Live bar that shows Claude usage and remaining quota at a glance. UsageBoard - Plugin-based dashboard that aggregates usage quotas across APIs, model services, search services, and proxy services. VibeProxy - Menu bar app to use existing Claude, ChatGPT, and other subscriptions with AI coding tools without API keys. ClipAi - Send copied content to AI with one click and get tasks done efficiently. Clicky - AI teaching assistant that lives next to your cursor and can see your screen. Skilly - An AI learning companion for creative software that watches your screen, talks you through tasks, and points at UI elements. Mac Vision Tools - A macOS menu bar app for real-time machine learning detection. Meeting Transcriber - Local-first meeting transcriber for Teams, Zoom, and Webex with on-device transcription, speaker separation, and Markdown protocol generation via your own LLM. Mask This - Real-time clipboard privacy tool that uses on-device AI to detect and mask sensitive text. HideMyData - Local AI-powered redaction tool for sensitive data in PDFs and images. Fazm - Voice-controlled AI agent built with accessibility and screen capture tools. lil agents - Tiny AI companions on your dock that open themed chat terminals for coding assistants. Notchy - Notch-based Claude Code terminal companion with project-aware sessions and live status. CodeIsland - Real-time status panel for AI coding agents with session tracking and permission controls. Agent Beacon - Tiny status lights for coding agents that show done, waiting, failed, or running tasks, with click-to-jump back to the source app. CodexIsland - Dynamic Island-style usage monitor for Claude Code and Codex limits. TablePro - Multi-database client with SQL autocomplete, inline editing, and built-in AI assistance. Development Stringz - Localization editor for app string files. Github contributions - GitHub contributions app, for iOS, WatchOS, and macOS. GithubListener - Simple app that will notify about new commits to watched repositories. JSON to Model class - Code generator that turns JSON into model classes in multiple languages. JSONExport - JSON-to-model-class generator with constructors and utility methods. j2s - macOS app to convert JSON objects into Swift structs (currently targets Swift 4 and Codable). Notenik - Note-taking app with many organizational options. Pixley Reader - Dedicated reader for Markdown files generated by AI tools in project folders. Pine - A modern MacOS markdown editor. UTM - Virtual machines for iOS and macOS VirtualBuddy - Virtual machine manager for running recent macOS versions on Apple Silicon. vphone-cli - CLI to boot a virtual iPhone (iOS 26) with Apple Virtualization.framework and PCC research VM infrastructure. ShotX - Keyboard-first capture tool for screenshots, recording, GIF export, annotation, and searchable history. Snapzy - Open-source tool for screenshots, screen recording, annotation, and editing.
